If you own a Tremor, you know that hitch gets beat up. This cover keeps it clean and protected when you're not towing. 🛠️ Made right here in the USA.

Check it out on Etsy — link in bio.

Your Chevy Trail Boss hitch receiver is bare metal. That means rust, corrosion, and an eyesore. Our 3D-printed receiver cover fits snug, protects the metal underneath, and actually looks intentional.

Open receiver hole on your ZR2 hitch looking bare? This insert slides in and fills it—gives your truck a clean, finished look when you're not towing. 🛻

Check it out on Etsy.
